heading: Consultations with representatives of domestic interests
label: 2547 Consultations with representatives of domestic interests
text: In carrying out the functions for which responsible under this subchapter, the Trade Representative and the Secretary concerned shall solicit technical and policy advice from the committees, established under , that represent the interests concerned, and may solicit advice from appropriate State agencies and private persons.section 2155 of this title
notes: Amendments1996— amended directory language of . See 1993 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 104–295Pub. L. 103–1821993—, as amended by , substituted “Trade Representative” for “Special Representative”.Pub. L. 103–182Pub. L. 104–295
